entries.canonicalPattern: Canonical source has a pnpm lockfile in one Vue app root.
entries.targetPattern: Target declares pnpm@11.11.0, has pnpm-lock.yaml, and has pnpm-workspace.yaml only for pnpm 11 allowBuilds policy.
entries.adaptation: Converted from npm to pnpm; package-lock.json deleted.

entries.canonicalPattern: One index.html and one Vite config.
entries.targetPattern: One index.html and one Vite config.
entries.adaptationReason: Target already matched the one-root topology.

entries.adaptation: Retained Pinia before Router before mount.
entries.adaptationReason: Matches canonical plugin ordering without source feature injection.

entries.canonicalPattern: One Pinia instance installed in bootstrap.
entries.targetPattern: One exported Pinia singleton installed in bootstrap.

entries.canonicalPattern: Bootstrap imports global app and board styles once.
entries.targetPattern: Bootstrap imports one global style entry once.
entries.adaptation: Retained P0 neutral global style entry.
entries.adaptationReason: No canonical feature/board styles copied in P0B.

entries.canonicalPattern: Canonical global styles own runtime token values.
entries.targetPattern: Target has one neutral token registry in src/styles/tokens.css.
entries.adaptationReason: P0 has no final feature token extraction.

entries.canonicalPattern: @ resolves to ./src across Vite, Vitest, and TS in the canonical source.
entries.targetPattern: @ resolves to ./src across Vite and TypeScript in the target; Vitest is intentionally absent under P0E owner policy.
entries.adaptation: Removed Vitest from the active target while preserving runtime Vite and TypeScript alias parity.
entries.adaptationReason: P0E forbids automated-test infrastructure; runtime alias behavior remains aligned.

entries.canonicalPattern: Vue DOM tsconfig with project includes.
entries.targetPattern: Vue DOM tsconfig with strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, TypeScript 6 deprecation acknowledgment for baseUrl, and project includes.
entries.adaptation: Kept stricter empty-baseline checks and added ignoreDeprecations 6.0 for the existing baseUrl path-alias setting required by TypeScript 6.
entries.adaptationReason: TypeScript 6 reports baseUrl as deprecated without ignoreDeprecations; this is a documented compiler configuration correction, not a typecheck bypass.

entries.targetPattern: vue-tsc@3.3.7 runs against real official typescript@6.0.3.
entries.adaptation: Removed TypeScript 7 and @typescript/typescript6 aliases; selected official TypeScript 6.0.3 for Vue SFC typechecking.
entries.adaptationReason: Official TypeScript guidance states Vue embedded-language tooling needs TypeScript 6 until stable TypeScript 7 API/tooling support exists; current vue-tsc passes with TypeScript 6.0.3.

entries.canonicalPattern: Vite module worker via new Worker(new URL(..., import.meta.url), { type: 'module' }).
entries.targetPattern: No worker runtime in P0; Vite baseline remains worker-compatible.
entries.adaptation: Do not implement worker runtime in P0B.
entries.adaptationReason: AI/search runtime belongs to later feature phase.

entries.canonicalPattern: Vite raw PGN and png?inline typing with direct imports.
entries.targetPattern: Target adds compatible module declarations but no product assets.
entries.adaptationReason: Asset rights gate remains unresolved; P0B copies no assets.

entries.canonicalPattern: Canonical source contains a Vitest jsdom test environment with globals, setupFiles, and spec includes.
entries.targetPattern: Target intentionally has no automated-test files, setup files, Vitest config, jsdom test environment, or spec includes.
entries.adaptation: Removed target test environment instead of aligning mechanically.
entries.adaptationReason: Explicit owner delivery policy prioritizes visible UI delivery and forbids automated-test infrastructure.
evidence: tsconfig.json without vitest globals or tests include

entries.canonicalPattern: Canonical source scripts include dev, build, preview, test, test:watch, and typecheck.
entries.targetPattern: Target scripts include dev, build, preview, typecheck, and typecheck:vue; no test or test-derived script remains.
entries.adaptation: Removed test and test:watch scripts while preserving development, preview, typecheck, and production build scripts.
entries.adaptationReason: P0E owner policy forbids a test package script.

entries.canonicalPattern: Start Vite and load configured base path.
entries.targetPattern: Start Vite through pnpm and perform one narrow real-browser load/reload at /pgnViewer/ without adding Playwright or another browser-test dependency to the target.
entries.adaptation: Browser evidence remains required as runtime smoke validation, not as an automated E2E suite.
entries.adaptationReason: P0E forbids automated-test infrastructure but preserves narrow browser runtime validation.

entries.canonicalPattern: Canonical active runtime categories include Vue, router, Pinia, Naive UI, GSAP, chess.js, Vite, Vitest, jsdom, and Vue type tooling.
entries.targetPattern: Target active graph includes the Vue runtime/tooling architecture with real official TypeScript 6.0.3 and intentionally excludes automated-test dependencies.
entries.adaptation: Removed Vitest, Vue Test Utils, and jsdom from the active target dependency graph; retained runtime and Vue SFC tooling dependencies.
entries.adaptationReason: Explicit owner delivery policy overrides canonical automated-test adoption without changing runtime architecture parity.

entries.area: TypeScript 7 and Vue tooling official compatibility bridge
entries.canonicalPattern: Microsoft recommends npm aliases so tools importing typescript can use @typescript/typescript6 while TypeScript 7 remains installed side-by-side.
entries.targetPattern: P0C bridge attempted typescript -> npm:@typescript/typescript6@6.0.2 and typescript-7 -> npm:typescript@7.0.2; P0D removes both from the active graph.
entries.adaptation: Retained as historical failure evidence and replaced by official TypeScript 6.0.3 Vue-compatible baseline.
entries.adaptationReason: Current stable Volar/vue-tsc cannot consume the @typescript/typescript6 shim, and TypeScript 7 lacks the stable programmatic API required by Vue tooling.
evidence: @typescript/typescript6@6.0.2 shim failed in P0C with Failed to locate tsc module path from shim.
typescript@6.0.3 selected as highest stable official 6.x release.

policyUpdate: P0E records explicit owner policy override: the canonical source contains a Vitest-based automated-test model, but the target intentionally does not adopt automated-test infrastructure. Runtime Vue architecture parity remains unchanged; future validation uses typecheck, production build, and narrow real-browser runtime evidence.

ownerPolicyOverride.ownerDecision: Prioritize visible, user-facing interface delivery and remove automated-test infrastructure from the active target.
ownerPolicyOverride.targetAutomatedTestModel: No automated test files, test configuration, test scripts, test fixtures, snapshots, coverage, or test-only dependencies are retained.
ownerPolicyOverride.runtimeArchitectureImpact: No change to Vue runtime architecture parity.
